data.name: blur
data.description: A magical energy that blurs the caster
data.fizzleMessage: You attempt to cast blur, but the magic sputters and fades.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {name} attempts to cast blur, but the magic sputters and fades.
data.hitMessageSelf: You cast blur. Your body begins to shimmer, then shifts into a hazy, indistinct outline.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} cast blur. Their body begins to shimmer, then shifts into a hazy, indistinct outline.

data.name: harm
data.fizzleMessage: You raise your hand in wrath, but nothing happens!
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} raises their hand in wrath, but nothing happens!
data.hitMessageSelf: You raise your hand in wrath and {target} writhes in pain for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} raise your hand in wrath and you writhe in pain for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} raise your hand in wrath and {target} writhes in pain for {damage} damage!

data.name: magic missile
data.description: A bolt of magical energy strikes your target.
data.fizzleMessage: Your magic missile fizzles out in a puff of smoke!
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {name}'s magic missile fizzles out in a puff of smoke!
data.hitMessageSelf: You unleash a glowing dart that slams into the {target} for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageTarget: {name} unleash a glowing dart that slams into the you for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageRoom: {name} unleash a glowing dart that slams into the {target} for {damage} damage!

data.name: minor healing
data.description: A spell that can heal light wounds.
data.fizzleMessage: You attempt to cast minor healing, but struggle and fail.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} attempts to cast minor healing, but struggle and fail.
data.hitMessageSelf: You utter a quiet prayer, and a warm light restores {healing} upon {target}..
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} utter a quiet prayer, and a warm light restores {healing} upon you.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} utter a quiet prayer, and a warm light restores {healing} upon {target}.

data.name: Illuminate
data.description: A magical light source for the caster.
data.fizzleMessage: You wave your hand and a faint spark appears, then quickly dies as your spell fails.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} waves their hand and a faint spark appears, then quickly dies as your spell fails.
data.hitMessageSelf: You wave your hand and a faint spark appears then grows into a glowing ball of light.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} waves their hand and a faint spark appears then grows into a glowing ball of light.
